do family and he will be proud.
MARS+MOON+VENUS Indicates late marriage, and her
husband will have brass-ears [i.e.,
listens to tales] misunderstandings in
family life prevails and husband
travels a lot for career.
MARS+MERCURY +
VENUS Husband will have intellectual
qualities but there will be never
ending quarrels also, any how they
will get property and wealth.
Husband will have co-operation
with another female. Sometimes
husband will have some commercial
type of inclinations.
MARS+J UPITER+
VENUS Her husband can be a manager and
a good administrator, or can work as
a guide.
MARS+SA TURN+
VENUS Her husband will have career
aspects in financial institutions (like
a bank), or a luxury type of career.

50 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
MARS+DRAGON HEAD
+VENUS ... Husband will be a fortune one, but
often faces troubles, and has career
connected with CHAYA (shadow,
photography, computers), career
pertaining to-wheels also indicated.
